title: Senior CAD Backend Engineer Mechanical CAD Automation

summary.lv: Senior CAD Backend inženieris uzņēmumā Foundation EGI (MIT izcelsmes), veidojot AI kopilotu mehāniskajai projektēšanai un ražošanai.
summary.en: Senior CAD Backend Engineer at Foundation EGI (MIT-born), building an AI copilot for mechanical design and manufacturing.
